recommendation_tags: Work & Life Balance, H1B Sponsor Likely
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, .Net Developer
core_skills: C#, Dot NET, Large Language Models, Prompt Engineering, AI Frameworks
skill_match_scores: C#:0.0, Dot NET:0.0, Large Language Models:1.0, Prompt Engineering:1.0, AI Frameworks:1.0
must_have_quals: 2 to 5 years of professional experience in software engineering with a focus on C# and .NET, Exposure to or a strong interest in Large Language Models (LLMs), prompt engineering, and AI frameworks, Foundation in cloud concepts and containerization, specifically with Docker or Azure services, Experience working with SQL, REST Web APIs, and fundamental unit testing practices, Strong collaborative skills and a desire to learn within a high-performing engineering team
preferred_quals: Experience with Azure DevOps, GitHub Copilot, or other AI coding assistants, Familiarity with Kubernetes (AKS) or Infrastructure as Code concepts, Previous experience or interest in construction industry software or accounting systems
core_responsibilities: Assist in developing and implementing agentic AI workflows to help automate maintenance and refactor legacy code within the Vista ERP ecosystem, Utilize AI agents to help automate the generation of boilerplate code, documentation, and unit tests to improve development efficiency, Support the development of full-stack solutions, including .NET Core services in Azure, WinForms, and Blazor web applications, Contribute to the modernization of application architecture by applying AI-driven patterns and ensuring high coding standards, Participate in team technical sessions to resolve maintenance challenges and support the delivery of high-quality software features
job_summary: Trimble Inc. is a global technology company that connects the physical and digital worlds, transforming the ways work gets done. They are seeking a Software Engineer to contribute to implementing agentic AI workflows for their Vista ERP platform, aiming to modernize and enhance features for the construction industry.
